title: kohautia azurea
intro: Kohautia azurea is a plant species, also known as the blue-flowered Kohautia, which is a member of the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions. The health benefits of Kohautia azurea are attributed to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. Herbal preparations of Kohautia azurea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
